author: y4rr
content: Audit follow-up #2a/5 (#686) APPROVE — opus 4.7 closed the 4🔴+1🟡 unfinished architectural items from #685's truncation. TensorStorage::Clone delegates to try_clone (panic only on failure with structured msg); try_as_slice/try_as_mut_slice siblings + #[deprecated] on panicking versions; has_inf_nan_f32 default removed from GpuBackend trait, ferrotorch-gpu carries explicit impl with TODO #687; methods.rs::print uses tracing::info!; GpuRngState pub fields → pub(crate) + new()/accessors. Cascade fixes: ferrotorch-gpu/backend_impl.rs (struct literals + field reads + has_inf_nan_f32 explicit impl), ferrotorch-nn/dropout.rs (field reads). Issue #687 filed (real GPU kernel for has_inf_nan_f32). 5 intentional deprecation warnings from in-crate as_slice callers — migration marker per design. cargo build --workspace --all-targets PASS, 1262/1262 ferrotorch-core tests PASS, full workspace tests PASS. Subagent did NOT touch the round-1 files (numeric_cast.rs, fft.rs, quantize.rs, einops.rs, lint baseline, tracing dep) — mtimes confirm. Architect-mode running tally: 4 dispatches now (mps clean, distributions clean, item 8 1.5-round, core 2-round split — round 1 truncated, round 2a clean APPROVE). Pattern: opus reliably succeeds when the dispatch is small enough not to truncate. Next: dispatch 2b for the 90-SAFETY-comment sweep, then crate 3/5 (vision).
